name: Slinger - Tower Blitz
description:
“Is this guy slow? Genuinely, he’s using a slingshot to kill people.”

-Sniper

The one and only..

The BEST starting tower of all tower defense games known to man...

The star of the UEC....

SLINGERRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR!

He doesn’t understand why he’s not managing to kill Invaders. Tower (Human) POV btw. Lolololololol. Couldn’t think of more to say.
